title: caltha palustris f. minor
intro: Caltha palustris f. minor, also known as marsh marigold, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Caltha palustris f. minor include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as its ability to fight off infections. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to promote health benefits, including reducing fever and improving digestion.
